keywords.title: Keywords or niches
keywords.description: Course topics, niches, or keywords to search for.

courseUrls.title: Direct course URLs
courseUrls.description: Optional direct course URLs to scan.

includePrices.title: Include prices
includePrices.description: Extract visible course prices when available.

includeCreatorInfo.title: Include creator info
includeCreatorInfo.description: Extract public creator/instructor names, URLs, and websites when visible.

includeContactInfo.title: Include public contact info
includeContactInfo.description: Extract public emails, phones, and contact pages from course or creator pages when visible.

includeSocialLinks.title: Include social links
includeSocialLinks.description: Extract public social links from course and creator pages.

locationOrLanguage.title: Location or language
locationOrLanguage.description: Optional location or language hint for search queries.

deduplicateResults.title: Deduplicate results
deduplicateResults.description: Remove duplicate course URLs from the output.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional Apify proxy configuration. Useful for reliable public web requests.

debugMode.title: Debug mode
debugMode.description: Save extra request/debug information to the key-value store.
